title: What I bring to the table

cards.heading: Production systems, not prototypes
cards.body: You get launch-ready systems, not throwaway demos. I build across frontend, backend, cloud, and operations with CI/CD, auth, observability, and clear runbooks.

cards.heading: Cloud-native from day one
cards.body: Containers, Terraform-driven infrastructure-as-code, Databricks-ready data workflows, and zero-downtime deploys from the first push. Built with equal AWS/GCP focus and ready to expand into Azure.

cards.heading: You own what I build
cards.body: Clean code, documented architecture decisions, and a full handoff runbook. No black boxes, no vendor lock-in, no dependency on me to keep the lights on.

cards.heading: Regulated-environment execution
cards.body: My background in Finance/FinTech operations and government-focused cloud/security consulting (AFS/IRS) helps teams move fast without losing auditability.

cards.heading: Fixed scope, fixed price
cards.body: I scope projects carefully so there are no surprises. Written proposal before any work begins. Retainer support available after delivery.

cards.heading: Secure by default
cards.body: Every layer hardened from the start: JWT/RBAC, secrets management, least-privilege IAM, and audit logging — informed by compliance exposure on federal programs.
